subject: [PATCH v5 05/18] mm: decouple protnone helpers from CONFIG_NUMA_BALANCING

2026-05-26.patch_summary: This patch decouples the protnone helpers from CONFIG_NUMA_BALANCING by introducing a new configuration option, CONFIG_ARCH_HAS_PTE_PROTNONE. This allows architectures that support present-but-inaccessible page table entries (protnone PTEs) to use them independently of NUMA balancing. The six architectures currently supporting protnone PTEs select this option and CONFIG_NUMA_BALANCING depends on it. No functional changes are made, but the infrastructure is now available separately from NUMA balancing.
